headline: A Standardized Ecosystem for Claude Code Extensions
lede: The official plugin marketplace formalizes the way third-party tools integrate with your local agent workflow. By enforcing a strict metadata schema, this repository ensures that every slash command and MCP server remains modular and discoverable within the growing Anthropic ecosystem.

headline: CodeGraph Maps Your Codebase for Smarter Agent Queries
lede: Latency in large codebases often stems from inefficient file scanning. CodeGraph replaces brute-force lookups with a persistent, SQLite-backed semantic index that keeps your agent’s context synchronized in real-time.

headline: Codify Agent Behavior with Karpathy’s Design Rules
lede: Stop your AI from over-engineering through defined configuration guardrails. This project translates expert analysis into a actionable CLAUDE.md manifest that forces agents to prioritize simplicity and verifiable testing loops.

headline: Official Skill Set Brings Professional .NET Logic to Agents
lede: Standardize how AI interacts with the .NET SDK using this collection of domain-specific plugins. The repository bridges the gap between general-purpose models and the rigorous requirements of managed enterprise environments.

headline: Superpowers Framework Disciplines Autonomous Coding Workflows
lede: Turning a chatbot into a developer requires more than prompt engineering; it requires an enforced methodology. This framework demands automated test-driven development and systematic self-review cycles before any code is committed.

headline: CLI-Anything Transforms Desktop Apps into Agent-Ready Tools
lede: Bridge the divide between graphical interfaces and command-line automation. By exposing professional software like Unreal Engine and Obsidian through text-based harnesses, this framework allows agents to execute complex, multi-state workflows.

headline: OpenWA Delivers a Self-Hosted WhatsApp API Gateway
lede: Take full control of your communication stack with this open-source alternative to proprietary messaging services. By isolating your data within a Docker-native architecture, you eliminate vendor lock-in and enhance system auditability.

headline: Directly Control Chrome Instances via Model Context Protocol
lede: Debugging fails when agents lack visibility into the live DOM. This server provides a direct interface to browser internals, enabling agents to parse console logs, capture traces, and perform data-driven performance tuning.

headline: A Comprehensive Path to AI Engineering Mastery
lede: True expertise requires understanding the underlying math before applying high-level frameworks. This 428-lesson curriculum guides learners through the construction of agents from the ground up, emphasizing technical depth over simple API calls.

headline: Unlock NotebookLM Through Programmatic Access
lede: Integrate Google’s research platform directly into your CI/CD pipelines with this Python-based automation library. The tool bypasses browser-based limitations, enabling bulk data extraction and structured content generation for your research workflows.
